tagline: Changing our clients' lives by changing the way they live outdoors

hero.headline: Your Outdoor Dream, Built by Family
hero.subheadline: For nearly 50 years, the Farrell family has transformed backyards across northwest Ohio into stunning outdoor living spaces. From custom patios to complete landscape overhauls, we handle every detail so you can simply enjoy the view.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Solutions<br class="hidden md:block"> From One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the final stone, we design, build, and maintain outdoor spaces that bring families together. No subcontractors, no runaround — just one team that does it all.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Custom landscape plans brought to life with expert plant selection, grading, and installation. We transform ordinary yards into spaces your family will love for years.

cards.title: Paver Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: ICPI-certified installation of paver patios, walkways, retaining walls, and driveways using premium Unilock materials built to last decades.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living Spaces
cards.description: Custom outdoor kitchens, pergolas, and living areas that extend your home into the backyard. Entertain, cook, and relax in style.

cards.title: Pool & Water Features
cards.description: Professional pool installation with seamless hardscape and landscape integration. We create complete backyard retreats, not just swimming holes.

cards.title: Lawn Care & Fertilization
cards.description: Year-round lawn programs including fertilization, weed control, grub treatment, and overseeding for a thick, healthy lawn that turns heads.

cards.title: Sprinklers & Landscape Lighting
cards.description: Protect your investment with professional irrigation systems and highlight it with landscape lighting that adds beauty and security.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us your vision. We'll visit your property, listen to your ideas, and provide an honest estimate with no pressure and no hidden fees.

steps.title: We Design & Build It Right
steps.description: Our experienced crew handles everything from custom design to expert installation. We keep you informed at every stage and treat your property like our own.

steps.title: Love Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Step outside into a backyard that feels like a retreat. And when you need maintenance or want to add something new, we're just a phone call away.

about.label: Why Families Choose Farrell's
about.headline: Second-Generation Family Business, First-Rate Results
about.description: Started by Tony and Wendy Farrell in 1976, our company is now proudly led by siblings Clayton and Katelynn Farrell. With nearly 50 years of roots in Bryan, Ohio, we've completed over 3,000 projects for families just like yours. Every crew member is trained to our family's standards — because your outdoor space is a reflection of our name.

features.title: Nearly 50 Years of Expertise
features.description: Two generations of hands-on experience means we've solved every challenge and perfected every technique in outdoor living.

features.title: One Team, Start to Finish
features.description: No subcontractors, no handoffs. The same family-trained crew that designs your project is the one that builds it.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Our 285+ positive reviews and BBB A+ rating aren't an accident. We don't consider a job done until you're thrilled with the result.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest pricing from a family that values trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Family Name" Guarantee
guarantee.description: When you hire Farrell's, you're hiring a family that stakes its 50-year reputation on every single project. If any aspect of our work doesn't meet your expectations, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. Our name is on the truck — and we intend to keep it worth trusting.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my project?
faqs.answer: Most projects are scheduled within 2-4 weeks depending on the season and scope. For lawn care services like mowing and fertilization, we can typically start within one week. Call us for current availability.

faqs.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide free on-site consultations and written estimates for all projects. There's no pressure and no obligation. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and give you an honest quote.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Bryan, Defiance, Archbold, Wauseon, Napoleon, and surrounding communities throughout northwest Ohio and northeast Indiana. If you're not sure whether we cover your area, just give us a call.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are fully licensed (#1734453), insured, ICPI certified, and a Unilock Authorized Contractor. We also hold a BBB A+ rating and are members of the Ohio Grounds Improvement Association.

faqs.question: Can you handle both design and installation?
faqs.answer: Yes — that's one of our biggest strengths. We handle everything from initial design through installation and ongoing maintenance. One team, one point of contact, and no subcontractor runaround.

testimonials.name: Cynthia C.
testimonials.text: Clayton and Kevin went above and beyond. We were very pleased with the unique design and ultimate appearance. They checked in often and remained attentive to our needs.

testimonials.name: David J.
testimonials.text: My wife and I are very happy with the service. Clayton is very personable and understanding. Juan and Orlando did an amazing job with the patio.

testimonials.name: Bill W.
testimonials.text: Clayton and the crew exceeded our expectations with their work ethic and attention to the most minute details. The yard reseeding and shrub replacement turned out better than we imagined.

contact.headline:

Your Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation and estimate. We'll visit your property, listen to your ideas, and show you what's possible — with honest pricing from a family you can trust.
benefits: 50 years of family expertise behind every project
